comments.comment:
The increased fugitive emissions can be attributed to changes in the methodology used for fugitive emissions calculations from equipment components. Using conservative value (pegged emission factors) was utilized to estimate emissions from equipment components that lacked or missed readings, which led to a higher estimation of emissions in 2022 compared to 2021.
Increase in emissions are also due to increased flaring in 2022.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
The increased emissions can be attributed to changes in the methodology used for fugitive emissions calculations from equipment components to meet new Federal VOC regulations requirement. Conservative value (pegged emission factors) was utilized to estimate emissions from equipment components that lacked or missed readings, which led to a higher estimation of emissions in 2022 compared to 2021. 
Increase in emissions are also due to increased flaring in 2022.
